global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a clear focus on discounts and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on a fashion app.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Mirror image icons
elements.description: Two mirrored icons resembling mirrors are centered, outlined in a light color, suggesting a beauty or fashion theme.

elements.label: Additional icons
elements.description: Another set of icons or images is placed slightly below the first, maintaining a minimalist design.

elements.label: Discount announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' appears in a smaller font at the top left corner, styled in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Install now' is located at the bottom center, designed to stand out with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' is positioned at the bottom left, indicating a special offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist and modern, discount announcement, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the app screenshot is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off Only this weekend, VantaStyle, Install now, 30%
